title: Profit / Loss
intro: All amounts are reported in USD. UZS entries are converted using the CBU exchange rate for each transaction date.

sales.title: Sales (USD, UZS converted at transaction-date rate)
sales.hint: Click a row to see how net profit was calculated for that sale.
sales.noRows: No sales completed in this period
sales.opexNote: Operating expenses are not allocated per sale; see the summary cards and operating expenses table.

operating.title: Operating expenses
operating.noRows: No operating expenses in this period

otherIncome.title: Other income
otherIncome.hint: Non-sale income (e.g. gain on fixed-asset sale). Cash proceeds are in Money Balance; only the profit portion is shown here.
otherIncome.noRows: No other income in this period
